description: 2048 is the viral puzzle game that took the world by storm. Slide numbered tiles to combine them, doubling their value each time. Reach the 2048 tile to win, then keep going for higher scores!

Build a chain of decreasing values along one edge
Think ahead - every move affects all tiles

faq.question: How do I win 2048?
faq.answer: Combine tiles until you create a 2048 tile. The key strategy is to keep your highest tile in a corner and build a descending chain.

faq.question: What happens after I reach 2048?
faq.answer: You can continue playing to reach higher tiles like 4096, 8192, and beyond. The game ends when no more moves are possible.
